creator: ebay@looksharp.net
text: Since chromium 36, I cannot use highlighting text in the URL bar to copy text to paste it into another window.  I also cannot use the middle mouse button to paste copied text into the URL bar.  Using the mouse to right click and cut/copy/paste works as well as ctrl-x/c/v but highlighting and middle clicking is less work for me.  Other text boxes within chromium seem to work, it is just the URL bar with the issue I think.
